notes: perf: eliminate cold-start penalty, reduce fixed latency overheads

notes: feat: webhook infrastructure + polling watchdog

0.3.81.title: feat: webhook infrastructure + polling watchdog
notes: feat: webhook infrastructure + polling watchdog
refactor: split telegram.ts into focused components + add polling watchdog

0.3.80.title: Smarter Quick-Replies
notes: When you message Jarvis while he's busy, he gives an accurate status update — no more making things up
Repeated messages get progressively sassier: "I only have 9 hands!"
Status updates reflect actual state: which model is thinking, what tool is running, how long it's been

0.3.76.title: Multi-Message Reaction Clearing
notes: Sending multiple messages no longer leaves stale reaction emojis — all pending reactions clear when Jarvis replies

0.3.75.title: Crash Resilience and Reliability
notes: Jarvis no longer crashes on backend errors — he reports the issue and keeps running
Backend errors are automatically retried once before reporting failure
Status messages now visually link to the message being processed (reply-to)
Fixed a compatibility issue where the small classifier model was being sent tool definitions it doesn't support

0.3.74.title: Emoji Reaction Lifecycle
notes: Reaction emojis now properly clear after Jarvis replies — previously they stayed permanently
Fixed: reactions were being removed in the wrong code path (IPC handler instead of response handler)

0.3.73.title: English Translation Fix and Test Coverage
notes: Fixed: English text no longer gets translated to English (Latin-script detection + SAME_LANGUAGE response)
Comprehensive test audit: 595 tests across 27 files, all passing
Test suite gates every deploy — tests must pass before build proceeds

0.3.70.title: Force-Route Tags and Emoji Reactions
notes: Use (think), (coder), (analyst), (architect) tags to force-route to a specific model
Tags are case-insensitive and trigger engagement without needing to say Jarvis's name
Model-specific emoji reactions: eyes for coordinator, sunglasses for coder, thinking for analyst, nerd for architect, star-eyes for artist
Thumbs-down reaction triggers Jarvis to ask what went wrong and learn from the feedback

0.3.65.title: Safe Deployment Pipeline
notes: Jarvis stays running until new version is fully built, tested, and verified
Tests gate every deploy — if tests fail, nothing ships
Only nanoclaw containers are stopped during deploy (no longer kills unrelated services)
Log rotation for production logs (>5MB rotated, 3 copies kept)

0.3.60.title: Art Pipeline and Creative Routing
notes: Jarvis asks for details before generating art — no more hallucinated prompts from vague requests
Creative pattern matching tightened to avoid routing simple messages to the artist
Artist uses generate_art tool directly instead of calling underlying functions

0.3.55.title: Request Tracing and Observability
notes: Every request gets a unique trace ID linking classification, tool calls, and response
Routing decisions logged with model used, reasoning, and prompt/response excerpts
Build version appears in all log entries for post-deploy verification

0.3.50.title: Reasoning Cleanup
notes: Jarvis no longer leaks internal reasoning blocks into chat responses
Reasoning is recorded for async review but never shown to users
Stale reasoning in conversation history is cleaned so the model doesn't learn to echo it

0.3.45.title: Admin-Only System Access
notes: Shell commands and system configuration are now restricted to admin DM only
Group chats can change their own preferences but cannot modify Jarvis's behavior or run commands
System prompt hides admin capabilities from non-admin chats

0.3.40.title: v0.3.40 — Fix coder misroute on user self-descriptions
notes: v0.3.40 — Fix coder misroute on user self-descriptions

0.3.39.title: v0.3.38 — Dynamic response translation, version sync
notes: v0.3.38 — Dynamic response translation, version sync
v0.3.38 — NLP-based reaction sentiment analysis
v0.3.37 — Broader praise detection for emoji reactions
v0.3.36 — Reasoning forwarded to DM in group chats
v0.3.35 — Changelog synced, non-printable characters cleaned

0.3.38.title: Dynamic response translation to registered languages
notes: When a request or response is not in English, Jarvis appends translations to all registered languages. No translation when both request and response are English. Languages controlled by translator_languages preference.
Reasoning blocks stripped from group chat responses and forwarded privately to DJ DM. Version synced to 0.3.38.

0.3.37.title: Broader praise detection for emoji reactions
notes: Short praise like "Impressive!", "I'm proud", "Love it" now gets an emoji reaction instead of a 14s coordinator response. Expanded trivial patterns to catch multi-word praise.

0.3.36.title: Reasoning forwarded to DM in group chats
notes: In group chats, reasoning blocks are stripped from the visible response and forwarded privately to DJ's DM. Keeps group chat clean while preserving full transparency for the owner.
Reasoning arrives as: 🧠 [GroupName] reasoning: ... in the Jarvis DM.

0.3.34.title: Correct pool allocation
notes: 4 secretary, 2 translator, 2 coordinator, 2 coder/image, 1 shared architect/vision. Coordinator was incorrectly capped at 1 slot (now 2). Translator model added to size tracking.

0.3.33.title: Shared inference slot for large models
notes: Models over 30GB (architect at 43GB, vision at 49GB) now share a single concurrency slot. Only one can run at a time  -  they can't coexist in VRAM. Prevents OOM and model eviction.

Slot allocation: secretary 4, coordinator 1, coder/image 2, all >30GB models share 1. 30s timeout with clear error instead of hanging. Pool gate wraps callOllama with acquire/release in finally block.

0.3.32.title: Swap secretary to gemma3:4b, NLP-first classification
notes: Replaced qwen2.5:3b with gemma3:4b for message classification. Benchmarked 12/12 accuracy (was 11/12). ~630ms vs 210ms but accuracy matters more than speed for task routing.

Removed regex guard for creative→coder misrouting  -  gemma3 handles it correctly. qwen2.5:3b stays for translations (lighter, sufficient). Warm script loads both gemma3:4b + qwen2.5:3b + coordinator.

0.3.31.title: Guard against coder misrouting creative tasks
notes: "Retry image request" was misclassified as code by the secretary. Added a guard: if the message mentions image/picture/art/video/film, never route to the coder regardless of secretary classification. Falls back to coordinator which has conversation history to handle retries.

0.3.30.title: Direct art and video generation
notes: "Create an image of..." and "Generate a video of..." now go straight to the Artist/Cinematographer, bypassing the coordinator entirely. No more 5-10s wait for the coordinator to decide to delegate.
Secretary-direct paths added for generate_art and generate_film. Pattern matches obvious create/generate/draw/paint + image/video keywords. Falls through to coordinator on failure.

0.3.29.title: Fix help trigger false positive
notes: "help" in a sentence like "help you learn" was triggering the help menu. Now only matches "help" as a standalone command (full-line match), not as a verb in conversation.

0.3.28.title: Task Permissions and Friendly Help
notes: Only DJ can schedule execution tasks. Anyone can set reminders. Friendlier help menu with all current features including translation, shortcuts, and voice.
Task scheduling gated by owner ID (365278370). Reminder keywords bypass the gate. get_help rewritten with warm tone, organized by what users actually want to do, includes translation/shortcuts/tags.

0.3.27.title: Task Scheduling Security
notes: Group chats can only create reminders (text notifications). Execution tasks like config changes, code runs, or service commands require a private DM.

Group task gate checks for reminder keywords (remind/notify/alert/ping). Non-reminder tasks return a clear error directing the user to DM. Prevents social engineering of scheduled execution tasks in group chats.

0.3.26.title: Inference Pool and Model Cleanup
notes: Per-model thread pool prevents memory overload. Old model workarounds removed. Each specialist gets their own system prompt.
Semaphore pool: secretary 4 slots, large models 1 slot, others 2. 125GB memory budget, 30s timeout. Removed llama3.2-vision workaround. Specialist personality injection.

0.2.0.title: Autonomous Operations & Self-Healing Infrastructure
notes: feat: zero-inference keyword classifier with route hints replaces LLM-based secretary
feat: adaptive performance tiers  -  context windows and sampling scale with task complexity
feat: user dissatisfaction detection with automatic escalation to higher reasoning tiers
feat: artist/cinematographer feedback-first workflow  -  creative plan before generation
feat: runtime model management  -  pull, remove, search, install across all backends
feat: service self-healing  -  start/restart backends via IPC without manual intervention
feat: preferences system with per-group defaults and per-user overrides
feat: voice transcription with multi-language auto-translation subscriptions
feat: per-user engagement tracking in group chats with disengage protocol
feat: performance metrics logging with version-over-version comparison
feat: event-driven IPC via fs.watch replaces 100ms polling
feat: source bind-mount  -  code changes apply without container rebuild
feat: post-build image verification with automatic buildkit cache recovery
feat: container version gating  -  stale containers exit on startup
feat: stuck-loop detection replaces hard tool-round cap (local = no cost limits)
fix: SearXNG preserved across builds  -  only nanoclaw containers killed
fix: web_search returns clear 'do not retry' on backend failure
fix: mid-task replies use coordinator, not disabled secretary
fix: all backend catch blocks log errors  -  no silent failures
test: 468 tests covering routing, classification, escalation, tools, and preferences

0.1.0.title: Intelligent Routing & Creative Pipeline
notes: feat: semantic message classification via qwen3:4b secretary with coordinator review
feat: self-improving routing  -  coordinator grades decisions, corrections feed back into classifier
feat: 4-tier escalation ladder with auto-escalation on model failure detection
feat: web search via local SearXNG metasearch (privacy-first, no external tracking)
feat: task scheduling  -  once, interval, and cron expressions via IPC
feat: proactive memory  -  updates personal notes on corrections and preferences
feat: image generation  -  FLUX via ComfyUI and OllamaDiffuser with auto-backend selection
feat: video generation  -  LTX-Video and HunyuanVideo with I2V support
feat: artist and cinematographer creative directors powered by qwen2.5vl:72b
feat: mid-task chat  -  respond to users while processing long-running tasks
feat: background history compression  -  runs between turns, not during inference
feat: voice transcription via local faster-whisper (no API key required)
feat: Telegram integration with bot pool, typing indicators, and thinking status
perf: adaptive context windows  -  8k to 64k based on model and task complexity
perf: specialist models evict immediately after use  -  coordinator stays pinned

0.0.1.title: Initial Setup
notes: feat: NanoClaw fork with Telegram channel integration
feat: ollama runner container for local model inference on Apple Silicon
feat: Jarvis bot registration with per-group container isolation
feat: Docker-based sandboxing with credential proxy
